description_long: This is a black bowler hat with a rounded crown and a short, upturned brim. The hat features a cream-colored ribbon encircling the base of the crown, adorned with a series of evenly spaced, round white decorative buttons or studs. The surface of the hat appears to be woven, likely from straw or a similar material, giving it a subtle texture. The crown is topped with a small, protruding button or nub, characteristic of traditional bowler hats. The brim is slightly asymmetrical, with some waviness and a gentle upward curve at the edges. The overall appearance is both classic and playful, suitable for stylish urban wear or as a statement accessory.
description: A black bowler hat with a cream ribbon and white decorative buttons, featuring a rounded crown and short, upturned brim.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cream ribbon and white buttons prominently around the base of the rounded crown.
description_view_1: Rear-side view highlighting the hat's woven texture and the continuation of the ribbon and buttons around the crown.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the smooth, rounded crown and the subtle upturn of the brim, with the ribbon partially visible.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the asymmetrical brim and the decorative band with buttons, as well as the crown's rounded profile.
attribute_crown_shape: rounded, domed crown with a small top button
